risks.mitigation: Do not expose the local development server to untrusted users; upgrade when Vite resolves to a compatible patched esbuild.
risks.resolutionCondition: Installed esbuild is outside the affected 0.27.3-0.28.0 range.

risks.exposure: CSS stringify output when supplied with untrusted CSS content
risks.mitigation: Do not pass untrusted user CSS through the affected stringify path; retain output escaping and monitor the Next dependency chain.
risks.resolutionCondition: Next resolves PostCSS to 8.5.10 or later through a compatible release.

risks.exposure: Transitive PostCSS advisory reported against the installed Next release
risks.mitigation: Reject npm's incompatible downgrade suggestion; keep lockfile pinned and upgrade only to a compatible patched Next release.
risks.resolutionCondition: A compatible Next release removes the affected PostCSS dependency range.
